pages.title: Native fonts, images, and runtime API

symbols.name: Area
symbols.summary: Immutable rectangle geometry used for bounds, clipping, and draw results.

symbols.name: contains
symbols.summary: Test whether the area contains a point.

symbols.name: contains_area
symbols.summary: Test whether another Area is fully contained.

symbols.name: intersects
symbols.summary: Test whether two areas overlap.

symbols.name: touches_or_intersects
symbols.summary: Test whether two areas overlap or share an edge.

symbols.name: shift
symbols.summary: Return a copy translated by the requested offset.

symbols.name: clip
symbols.summary: Return the intersection with another Area.

symbols.name: offset
symbols.summary: Return an Area expanded independently on each edge.

symbols.name: inset
symbols.summary: Return an Area reduced independently on each edge.

symbols.name: x
symbols.summary: Left coordinate.

symbols.name: y
symbols.summary: Top coordinate.

symbols.name: w
symbols.summary: Width in pixels.

symbols.name: h
symbols.summary: Height in pixels.

symbols.name: ClipContext
symbols.summary: Context manager returned by Draw.clip() for scoped clipping.

symbols.name: __enter__
symbols.summary: Push the requested clipping area and return the effective clip.

symbols.name: __exit__
symbols.summary: Pop the clipping area when leaving the context.

symbols.name: ClippedCanvas
symbols.summary: Canvas proxy that intersects writes with a fixed Area.

symbols.name: pixel
symbols.summary: Read or write one pixel, depending on whether a color is supplied.

symbols.name: fill
symbols.summary: Fill the target canvas with one color and return the affected Area.

symbols.name: fill_rect
symbols.summary: Fill a rectangular region and return the clipped affected Area.

symbols.name: hline
symbols.summary: Draw a horizontal line.

symbols.name: vline
symbols.summary: Draw a vertical line.

symbols.name: blit_rect
symbols.summary: Copy a packed RGB565 rectangle onto the target.

symbols.name: blit_transparent
symbols.signature: ClippedCanvas.blit_transparent(buffer, x, y, width, height, key)
symbols.summary: Copy a packed RGB565 rectangle while skipping the transparent key.

symbols.name: width
symbols.summary: Width in pixels.

symbols.name: height
symbols.summary: Height in pixels.

symbols.name: FrameBuffer
symbols.signature: class FrameBuffer(buffer, width, height, format, stride=None)
symbols.summary: A framebuf-compatible native drawing surface backed by a writable buffer.

symbols.name: from_file
symbols.summary: Load a supported image file into a new FrameBuffer.

symbols.name: fill
symbols.summary: Fill the target canvas with one color and return the affected Area.

symbols.name: fill_rect
symbols.summary: Fill a rectangular region and return the clipped affected Area.

symbols.name: pixel
symbols.summary: Read or write one pixel, depending on whether a color is supplied.

symbols.name: hline
symbols.summary: Draw a horizontal line.

symbols.name: vline
symbols.summary: Draw a vertical line.

symbols.name: rect
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.rect(x, y, width, height, color, fill=False)
symbols.summary: Draw an outlined or filled rectangle.

symbols.name: round_rect
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.round_rect(x, y, width, height, radius, color, fill=False)
symbols.summary: Draw an outlined or filled rounded rectangle.

symbols.name: circle
symbols.summary: Draw an outlined or filled circle.

symbols.name: line
symbols.summary: Draw a line between two points.

symbols.name: ellipse
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.ellipse(x, y, x_radius, y_radius, color, fill=False, mask=0x0F)

symbols.name: poly
symbols.summary: Draw a polygon from a packed coordinate buffer.

symbols.name: arc
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.arc(x, y, radius, start_angle, end_angle, color)
symbols.summary: Draw a circular arc between two angles.

symbols.name: triangle
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.triangle(x0, y0, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, fill=False)
symbols.summary: Draw an outlined or filled triangle.

symbols.name: gradient_rect
symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.gradient_rect(x, y, width, height, color1, color2=None, vertical=True)
symbols.summary: Fill a rectangle with a horizontal or vertical color gradient.

symbols.signature: FrameBuffer.polygon(points, x, y, color, angle=0, center_x=0, center_y=0)

symbols.summary: Copy a packed RGB565 rectangle onto the target.
